collision energy: the collision energy ranged from 23 to 65 eV depending on ion mass and charge
enrichment method: isolated P4-ATPases-CDC50A complexes from retina... on a CDC50A immunoaffinity column
fractionation method: resolved proteins from membranes of brain, kidney, testes, and liver by SDS gel electrophoresis
instrument: analyzed by a quadrupole–time of flight mass spectrometer (Impact II; Bruker Daltonics)
